channel.title: Earnify Blog — Publisher Monetization Insights & Guides
channel.description: Insights, guides, and technical deep-dives on website monetization, browser-based mining, privacy compliance, and ad-free revenue strategies for publishers.

item.title: The Environmental Impact of Browser Mining: Fact vs Fiction
item.description: Does browser-based crypto mining destroy the planet? We analyze real energy data, compare browser mining to traditional mining and ad tech, and separate fact from fiction.

item.title: How to Add Earnify to Your WordPress Site in 5 Minutes
item.description: Step-by-step guide to integrating Earnify's browser-based crypto mining on your WordPress site. No plugins, no backend changes—just one script tag and 5 minutes.

item.title: Browser Mining vs Display Ads: Revenue Per Visitor Compared
item.description: A data-driven comparison of browser-based crypto mining and traditional display advertising revenue per visitor. Learn which monetization method earns more and when to use each.

item.title: Mining Opt-In UX Design: Best Practices for Higher Consent Rates
item.description: UX patterns, dark patterns to avoid, and A/B-tested opt-in designs that maximize mining consent rates ethically.

item.title: Case Study: How One Publisher 3x'd Revenue by Adding Browser Mining
item.description: Real publisher case study — 3x revenue by layering opt-in browser mining alongside existing ad monetization.

item.title: How Browser-Based Mining Works: A Complete Technical Guide
item.description: End-to-end technical explanation — stratum protocol, Web Workers, WASM, pool integration, and reward distribution.

item.title: Browser Mining for Freelancers & Agencies
item.description: Why freelancers and agency owners should add browser mining to client sites — and how to propose it with confidence.

item.title: Zero-Server Infrastructure: How Earnify Runs Mining Entirely in the Browser
item.description: Architecture deep-dive — Web Workers, WASM MinotaurX hashing, Socket.IO Stratum relay, dev fee model, and security.

item.title: Browser Mining in 2026: Is It Still Profitable? (Revenue Data + Setup Guide)
item.description: Honest browser mining revenue data for 2026: RVN earnings per visitor, comparison vs ads, and a 5-minute setup guide. No hype, just real numbers.

item.title: How to Recover Revenue Lost to Ad Blockers with Browser Mining
item.description: Ad blockers cost publishers up to 42.7% of display revenue. Learn how browser-based compute monetization recovers that lost income.

item.title: Coinhive Alternatives: Best Browser Mining Solutions for 2026
item.description: Compare the top Coinhive alternatives for 2026 — Earnify, CryptoLoot, Coinimp, and more — with real features, fees, and privacy analysis.

item.title: How to Monetize Your Website Without Ads: A Guide for Publishers
item.description: Learn the most effective ways to generate revenue from your website without relying on invasive display advertising or tracking cookies.

item.title: MinotaurX vs Power2B: Which Algorithm Is Most Profitable for Browser Mining?
item.description: Technical comparison of mining algorithms for browser-based compute with real-world hashrate benchmarks.

item.title: Is Browser-Based Mining GDPR Compliant? A Publisher's Legal Guide
item.description: Complete legal guide covering GDPR, CCPA, and ePrivacy compliance for browser-based compute monetization.

item.title: The History of Web Mining: From Coinhive to Earnify
item.description: The complete evolution of browser-based cryptocurrency mining from Coinhive's 2017 dominance to modern open-source architecture.
